title: The Kind Little Fox
moral: Being kind to others makes the world a better place, and kindness always comes back to you.
moralZh: 对别人善良，世界就会变得更美好，善良总会回到你身边。

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: One sunny morning in the forest, a little fox named Felix was playing near the big oak tree.

paragraphs.speaker: Felix
paragraphs.text: "What a beautiful day! I wonder if anyone wants to play with me today."

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Then Felix saw a little hedgehog sitting alone behind a bush. The hedgehog looked very sad.

paragraphs.speaker: Felix
paragraphs.text: "Hello! My name is Felix. What's your name?"

paragraphs.speaker: Holly
paragraphs.text: "I... I'm Holly. Please don't come close. My back is full of spikes. I might hurt you."

paragraphs.speaker: Felix
paragraphs.text: "Don't worry! I can still be your friend. Would you like to play with me?"

paragraphs.speaker: Holly
paragraphs.text: "Really? No one has ever wanted to play with me because of my spikes."

paragraphs.speaker: Felix
paragraphs.text: "That's not very kind of them. Let me show you something."

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Felix took Holly to a beautiful garden full of colorful flowers.

paragraphs.speaker: Felix
paragraphs.text: "Look! These are called sunflowers. They face the sun every day. You know why?"

paragraphs.speaker: Felix
paragraphs.text: "Because they are kind to everyone! They give their warmth to everyone who passes by."

paragraphs.speaker: Holly
paragraphs.text: "Like you? You are being very kind to me today."

paragraphs.speaker: Felix
paragraphs.text: "Being kind is easy! Let me teach you a game we can play together."

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Felix and Holly played games together all morning. Holly laughed and smiled for the first time in a long time.

paragraphs.speaker: Holly
paragraphs.text: "Felix, thank you so much! You made me feel like I was not alone anymore."

paragraphs.speaker: Felix
paragraphs.text: "That's what friends do! And now, I have a friend too. Your spikes are not scary at all!"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: From that day on, Felix and Holly were the best of friends. They learned that being kind to others makes everyone happy, including yourself.
